title: Responsible AI Guidance for Businesses
description: Comprehensive voluntary guidance for New Zealand businesses on adopting and deploying AI systems responsibly. Covers governance, risk management, compliance, data ethics, transparency, and stakeholder engagement across the AI lifecycle, aligned with OECD principles and New Zealand values.
